prompt: A haunting, cinematic scene of a crowded Indian city where people are slowly fading into smoke, their bodies dissolving into grey polluted air, ghost-like silhouettes walking through thick smog, a child reaching out but disappearing into haze, no charts, no text, emotional, symbolic, dramatic lighting, high detail, realistic style, metaphor for invisible deaths caused by air pollution, magazine cover style --no graphs, no labels
